description: Fyxer is an AI email and meeting assistant that works with Gmail and Outlook to organize inboxes, draft replies, and capture meeting notes and transcripts. It is aimed at professional users and teams who want AI assistance embedded in their existing communication workflows.
summary: Fyxer exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp.fyxer.com/mcp / https://app.fyxer.com/mcp for connecting AI clients to inbox and meeting context; no separate public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface was found.
